process_details: Physical mixture obtained by gentle mixing in a mortar for 15-20 min, then quench cooled in DSC at 10 K/min after melting.
notes: Stored at standard storage conditions (T = 298 K, RH = 60%). XRD measured daily for a week, weekly for a month, then monthly up to 1 year.

process_details: Physical mixture obtained by gentle mixing in a mortar for 15-20 min, then quench cooled in DSC at 10 K/min after melting.
notes: Stored at elevated temperature (T = 373 K, ~50 K above Tg), supercooled liquid state. Recrystallization onset at 210 min (3.5 h = 0.146 d). Total experiment duration 30 h. | [review] Storage at T > Tg (supercooled liquid), well outside ICH Q1A protocols; RH not reported for 373 K experiment
